channel.title: +Misc on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website
channel.description: Recent content in +Misc on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website

item.title: Qualifications & mode
item.description:
shAstrArtha debate

If there is any controversy or dispute, you should participate in a proper shastrartha (scholarly debate) there instead of uploading trivial and unnecessary videos on YouTube.

  • @रंजनमंडल-छ5प

However, the right place to take that grievance is to the source—Sringeri—rather than sowing doubt (dhwandhwa) among viewers in a YouTube comment section. - @jayanthkumarnataraja137

This is just your prejudice and ignorant. Scholarly debate can take any of the following froms:
